5: Implementing prompt chaining ranges from direct, sequential function calls within a script to
6: the utilization of specialized frameworks designed to manage control flow, state, and
7: component integration. Frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, Crew AI, and the Google
8: Agent Development Kit (ADK) offer structured environments for constructing and executing
9: these multi-step processes, which is particularly advantageous for complex architectures.
10: For the purpose of demonstration, LangChain and LangGraph are suitable choices as their
11: core APIs are explicitly designed for composing chains and graphs of operations. LangChain
12: provides foundational abstractions for linear sequences, while LangGraph extends these
13: capabilities to support stateful and cyclical computations, which are necessary for
14: implementing more sophisticated agentic behaviors. This example will focus on a fundamental
